exploration_notes: When a QuerySet is first iterated, `QuerySet.__iter__` (query.py:396) calls `_fetch_all()` (query.py:2093), which checks if `_result_cache is None` — the lazy evaluation gate. If the cache is empty, it instantiates the iterable class, which ultimately invokes `SQLCompiler.execute_sql()` (compiler.py:1601). That method first calls `self.as_sql()` (compiler.py:763) to compile the SQL, then runs `cursor.execute(sql, params)` (compiler.py:1631). Any database-level OperationalError (bad connection, s
